completed_slice: Implemented and tested a deterministic provenance-preserving effective-state reducer with owner checks, protected-governance rejection, field-level source attribution, causal supersession, and unresolved-conflict output.
verification: Five deterministic Node tests passed against byte-identical source and test content before commit.
verified_claims: Explicit owner-scoped patches preserve untouched baseline fields.
Resolved fields retain the exact winning record, path, commit, and commit time.
Owner mismatches and protected-governance mutations are rejected.
Incompatible assertions without explicit causal supersession remain unresolved_conflict.
Explicit causal supersession can advance a field while retaining the new winning source.
remaining: Normalize existing queue-update record classes into the explicit patch contract.
Derive commit reachability from repository ancestry instead of caller-supplied sets.
Generate and attest a repository-wide materialized effective-state view.
privacy_boundary: Public repository metadata and abstract state-reconciliation semantics only; no private chat, health, credentials, identifying personal data, or unreviewed uploads.
rollback: Revert commit e533db3fc8a87e9d753b8b67c3dd9362cefb3a51 to remove CM-1032.
Revert commits 18d32a818cb375e5bede816397eb011e4b8d40cb and 5f7b5b69ed58c6365d342486fdfc4fa9656f7ce2 to remove the test and reducer.
